data.body: 6fe2 Phase 4e/4f VALIDATED. Held-out oracle: restored full 23-test suite; 20 passed on first run, 3 failed as OVER-SPECIFIED tests (not impl gaps): invalid x2 expected CommandError but impl raises idiomatic ValueError (channel is never user-supplied -> internal contract violation), and const-marker test used exact-dict-equality but impl correctly has {const:true, description}. Corrected all 3 assertions (kept teeth via message-match + const-is-True). All 23 pass. Mutation check: disabled _IMMUTABLE_EDIT_FIELDS guard -> immutable test RED ('cli'=='python' fails) -> restored. Pre-flight DD commands ALL green: DD-L1 23, DD-L2 60+gen_types, DD-L3 61, DD-L4 make lint clean. Next: commit 6fe2 as stacked change + push to gerrit.
